reference: Hello, I am a service holder, age twenty-eight. My wife is a banker, age twenty-six. Several years have passed, and there has been a mental conflict between my wife and my family that is still ongoing. In every situation, I feel I have nothing to do. I always want peace, but now my wife does not like my family, and my family does not like her. I am also disliked by everyone. I am trying to understand her, but I could not. What type of activities can I engage in to address this problem?
text: Hello, I am a service holder, age twenty-eight. My wife is a banker, age twenty-six. Several years have passed, and there has been a mental conflict between my wife and my family that is still ongoing. In every situation, I feel I have nothing to do.
